levels.title: Hand Rankings
levels.subtitle: Know every hand instantly
levels.description: Master the ten poker hand rankings from Royal Flush down to High Card. You need to identify hands at a glance — no hesitation, no second-guessing. Speed and accuracy are everything.

levels.title: Counting Outs
levels.subtitle: See your outs at a glance
levels.description: Learn to count your outs — the cards that can improve your hand. Flush draws, straight draws, overcards, and combo draws. The foundation of all poker math.

levels.title: Rule of 2 and 4
levels.subtitle: Quick probability estimation
levels.description: Convert outs into probabilities instantly using the Rule of 2 and 4. Multiply outs by 2 for one card to come, by 4 for two cards to come. Fast, practical poker math.

levels.title: Pot Odds
levels.subtitle: Is the price right?
levels.description: Compare the price the pot is offering to the probability of completing your hand. Learn to make mathematically correct calling and folding decisions.

levels.title: Expected Value
levels.subtitle: Think in EV
levels.description: Move beyond pot odds to expected value — the average amount you win or lose per decision. Learn to calculate EV for calls, raises, and bluffs.

levels.title: Position & Preflop
levels.subtitle: Starting hands by position
levels.description: Not all starting hands are equal — and position changes everything. Learn which hands to play from early, middle, and late position, and why position is power.

levels.title: Putting It Together
levels.subtitle: Full hand analysis
levels.description: Combine everything — hand rankings, outs, probability, pot odds, EV, and position — into complete hand analysis. Real scenarios that test all your skills at once.

level-1.title: Hand Rankings
level-1.description: Learn and drill the ten poker hand rankings.

level-1.title: Identify the Hand
level-1.description: Given cards, name the best poker hand.

level-1.title: Rank the Hands
level-1.description: Compare two hands and pick the winner.

level-2.title: Counting Outs
level-2.description: Learn to count outs for common draw types.

level-2.title: Draw Outs
level-2.description: Count outs for flush draws, straight draws, and overcards.

level-2.title: Combo Draws
level-2.description: Count outs when you have multiple draws at once.

level-3.title: One Card to Come
level-3.description: Use the Rule of 2 on the turn.

level-3.title: Two Cards to Come
level-3.description: Use the Rule of 4 on the flop.

level-4.title: Pot Odds
level-4.description: Learn to calculate and compare pot odds.

level-4.title: Calculate Pot Odds
level-4.description: Compute the odds the pot is offering you.

level-4.title: Call or Fold
level-4.description: Compare pot odds to hand odds and decide.

level-5.title: Expected Value
level-5.description: Learn to think in terms of EV.

level-5.title: EV of a Call
level-5.description: Calculate whether a call is profitable.

level-5.title: EV of a Bluff
level-5.description: Calculate whether a bluff is profitable.

level-6.title: Position & Preflop
level-6.description: Learn starting hand selection by position.

level-6.title: Position Play
level-6.description: Decide what to do based on your position.

level-7.title: Putting It Together
level-7.description: Combine all concepts in full hand analysis.

level-7.title: Full Hand Analysis B
level-7.description: More mixed scenarios at higher difficulty.
